\tzpentry{ID4168}{Inst Action Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4168 introduces Inst Action Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$ S_{inst} = \int_{-\infty}^{\infty} dt \left[\frac{1}{2}m_{eff}\dot{d}^2 + U_{barrier}(d)\right] $$
